_comment: Cursor hooks for this project. Run 'python scripts/hooks/<name>.py' from the workspace root. Keep hooks fast (<300ms typical).

beforeShellExecution.description: Block dangerous commands (rm -rf /, force-push to main, drop database, raw kubectl delete, etc.).

afterFileEdit.description: Format & lint changed files (prettier/eslint for TS/JS, ruff for Python). Best-effort, non-blocking.

agentStart.description: Inject MEMORY_SNAPSHOT.md + current sprint goals + active sub-agent brief into the agent context.

agentStop.description: Append session highlights to docs/sessions/<date>.md and update MEMORY_SNAPSHOT.md.

beforeReadFile.description: Redact secrets if .env* is being read; warn on private keys.

agentResponse.description: Log tokens/model/latency to local eval store (data/agent_responses.jsonl) for cost & regression tracking.
